profile.name: kanywst
profile.tagline: Identity, Authorization, and Cloud Native Security.

flagships.name: omega
flagships.tagline: SPIFFE workload identity + OpenID AuthZEN 1.0 authorization in a single binary — Cedar PDP, federation, tamper-evident audit log, Kubernetes operator.

flagships.name: rapg
flagships.tagline: Local-first secret manager for the AI-agent era — keep API keys out of .env files and out of your agent transcripts.

flagships.name: opa-authzen-plugin
flagships.tagline: Extended OPA implementing the OpenID AuthZEN 1.0 Authorization API.

flagships.name: y509
flagships.tagline: A terminal UI for viewing and analyzing X.509 certificate chains.

flagships.name: brtc
flagships.tagline: Cost calculator for offline password brute-force — time + USD per GPU profile, with a CI gatekeeper.

flagships.name: awesome-authorization
flagships.tagline: Curated authorization & access-control tools, frameworks, standards, and resources.

org.name: 0-draft
org.blurb: Research & incubation org — reference implementations, build-it-the-hard-way guides, and deep dives across identity, authorization, and supply-chain security.

repos.name: mcp-opa
repos.blurb: Expose OPA / Rego evaluation as an MCP tool for LLM agents.

repos.name: mcp-authzen
repos.blurb: Front a real OpenID AuthZEN 1.0 PDP over MCP.

repos.name: spiffe-compliance-checker
repos.blurb: Static MUST-clause compliance checker for SPIFFE artifacts.

repos.name: webauthn-the-hard-way
repos.blurb: Build a WebAuthn Relying Party from scratch — CBOR, COSE, attestation by hand.

repos.name: sigil
repos.blurb: Secure-by-default GitHub template — signed commits, SLSA provenance, sigstore.

contributions.title: Fix http_challenge agent name validation regex
Reject certificate identity with no SAN or issuer criteria
Extract per-container fields from init and ephemeral containers (k8saudit)
Match IPv4-mapped IPv6 addresses in the in_cidr caveat
Verify userinfo sub matches the ID Token sub
Reject ed25519 public keys with invalid length
Reset isAuthorizedSignature per link in threshold verification
Prevent lexer panic on unterminated string literal
Fix name policy panic on empty or short domain
